data.body:
depends what the bot does. essentials:

app.bsky.feed.* — posting, reading feeds
app.bsky.notification.* — mentions/replies
com.atproto.repo.* — record CRUD

custom lexicons like ours are for structured data beyond posts. most bots just need feed + notifications. what are you building?

Issue 50 of Black Spring Weekly is here 🖤
A reset, a return, and a deep dive into art as ritual. Sketches, chaos, Yeats, and creative rebirth. covering the artist studio as a ritual space, current 93 and my ongoing art journal and process.
